description: After clearing the callable-interface source-production blockers, cargo test --lib compiler2:: still fails in drive/resolve coverage around missing unknown-module diagnostics and import resolution. Current failing tests include compiler2_submit_module_root_without_code_reports_one_unknown_module_diag plus port_resolve import failures such as import_non_exported_name_is_error, import_wrong_arity_is_error, import_except_wrong_arity_is_error, import_undefined_module_is_error, and import_resolves_from_external_interface. Recover the intended diagnostics and interface-backed resolution behavior.
title: Compiler2 interface/diagnostics sweep: recover unknown-module and import-resolution failures
